entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: Mtego wa kawaida unaoonya kuhusu kosa linalowezekana.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Upande wa nyuma mfupi unaokamilisha wazo.

entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Maktaba ya kozi huwa imara zaidi wakati hoja ya utafutaji inalingana na ujuzi, mada, au kiwango kinachojulikana.

entries.source: A crawlable directory of every guest learning chat entrypoint.
entries.value: Orodha inayoweza kutambazwa ya kila njia ya kuingia kwenye gumzo la kujifunza kwa wageni.

entries.source: A crawlable guide library for AI tutoring, study skills, prompt loops, active recall, public learning modes, and practical AI-assisted learning.
entries.value: Maktaba ya miongozo inayoweza kutambazwa kwa ufundishaji wa AI, mbinu za kusoma, mizunguko ya vidokezo, kukumbuka kwa bidii, hali za umma za kujifunza, na kujifunza kwa vitendo kwa msaada wa AI.

entries.source: A crawlable map of AI learning workflows that connects public guest modes, prompt starters, learning paths, and practical guides.
entries.value: Ramani inayoweza kutambazwa ya mitiririko ya kujifunza kwa AI inayounganisha hali za umma za wageni, vidokezo vya kuanzia, njia za kujifunza, na miongozo ya vitendo.

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: mkosoaji;

entries.source: A direct explanation can be useful. But sometimes the best way to understand an idea is to wrestle with it.
entries.value: Maelezo ya moja kwa moja yanaweza kusaidia. Lakini wakati mwingine njia bora ya kuelewa wazo ni kupambana nalo kwa kufikiri.

entries.source: A focused collection of inspir guides about {value1}, with prompts, study workflows, and related public learning modes.
entries.value: Mkusanyiko uliolenga wa miongozo ya inspir kuhusu {value1}, ukiwa na vidokezo, mitiririko ya masomo, na hali za umma za kujifunza zinazohusiana.

entries.source: A free AI learning companion for people teaching themselves.
entries.value: Msaidizi wa bure wa kujifunza kwa AI kwa watu wanaojifundisha wenyewe.

entries.source: A free AI tutor for students who want to understand, not copy.
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa bure wa AI kwa wanafunzi wanaotaka kuelewa, si kunakili.

entries.source: A free public AI learning companion for tutoring, practice, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: Msaidizi wa bure wa umma wa kujifunza kwa AI kwa ufundishaji, mazoezi, maswali, flashcards, mjadala, mrejesho wa uandishi, msaada wa programu, na kupanga masomo.

entries.source: A free-to-access AI tutor layer that can fit your institution.
entries.value: Tabaka la mkufunzi wa AI linalopatikana bila malipo na linaloweza kuendana na taasisi yako.

entries.source: A generic answer can make a worksheet look finished while leaving the misconception untouched. The math route links hints, step checks, Socratic questions, quizzes, and flashcards into one learning loop.
entries.value: Jibu la jumla linaweza kufanya karatasi ya kazi ionekane imekamilika huku dhana potofu ikibaki bila kuguswa. Njia ya hisabati huunganisha vidokezo, ukaguzi wa hatua, maswali ya Kisokrati, maswali ya majaribio, na flashcards katika mzunguko mmoja wa kujifunza.

entries.source: A good family AI workflow should make the learner more independent, not more dependent. Parents can use public pages to see what each mode is meant to do before a child starts.
entries.value: Mtiririko mzuri wa AI kwa familia unapaswa kumfanya mwanafunzi ajitegemee zaidi, si ategemee zaidi. Wazazi wanaweza kutumia kurasa za umma kuona kila hali imekusudiwa kufanya nini kabla mtoto hajaanza.

entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: Kipindi kizuri cha kujifunza kina mzunguko

entries.source: A good path does not end at the answer. It ends with a test, a correction, and a next repetition.
entries.value: Njia nzuri haiishii kwenye jibu. Huishia na jaribio, marekebisho, na marudio yanayofuata.

entries.source: A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Chumba cha mwongozo wa hoja kwa ajili ya uulizaji maswali wenye nidhamu

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: Kidokezo kinachosaidia bila kutoa kila kitu.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Mbadala wa Khan Academy kwa nyakati za kujifunza moja kwa moja kwa AI.

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.
entries.value: Msingi wa wanafunzi ambao tayari umevuka India na kufikia hadhira pana ya kimataifa.

entries.source: A learner can open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, or flashcards directly in guest mode from the public learning modes directory.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anaweza kufungua Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, maswali, au flashcards moja kwa moja katika hali ya mgeni kutoka kwenye saraka ya hali za umma za kujifunza.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anayechagua kati ya zana kwa kawaida huhitaji moja kati ya mambo matatu: mtaala uliopangwa, mkufunzi wa moja kwa moja kwa sehemu iliyokwama, au mzunguko wa mazoezi unaofanya wazo libaki limeeleweka.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi mara nyingi hupitia video, makala, mazoezi, na dashibodi zilizoandaliwa.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi huanza ndani ya gumzo maalum la hali na anaweza kuomba mfano rahisi zaidi, swali gumu zaidi, jaribio, seti ya flashcards, au ukosoaji.

entries.source: A learning community begins
entries.value: Jamii ya kujifunza inaanza

entries.source: A parent-friendly guide to inspir's public AI learning modes for homework hints, explanation, study routines, flashcards, and safer learning conversations.

entries.source: A personal tutor should not be limited by geography or income.

entries.source: A plain-language mental model, sharper questions, and review cards that make the idea easier to remember.

entries.source: A plan that fits real life, quizzes that reveal weak areas, and review material built from errors.

entries.source: A smaller next step, a clearer mistake explanation, and a final answer the learner can actually defend.
entries.value: Hatua ndogo inayofuata, maelezo yaliyo wazi zaidi ya kosa, na jibu la mwisho ambalo mwanafunzi anaweza kulitetea kweli.

entries.source: A Socratic tutor can surface those gaps without turning the session into a lecture.
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa Kisokrati anaweza kuonyesha mapengo hayo bila kugeuza kipindi kuwa mhadhara.

entries.source: A strong session usually has four stages.
entries.value: Kipindi imara kwa kawaida kina hatua nne.

entries.source: A student, parent, teacher, and self-taught learner often search for the same AI tutor in different language. Separate pages make the right use cases and safety boundaries clearer.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi, mzazi, mwalimu, na anayejifundisha mwenyewe mara nyingi hutafuta mkufunzi yuleyule wa AI kwa lugha tofauti. Kurasa tofauti hufanya matumizi sahihi na mipaka ya usalama iwe wazi zaidi.

entries.value: Hali ya muda ya kupakia kwa inspir.

entries.source: A tutor for the first question

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Kadi yenye manufaa huuliza jambo moja. Haipaswi kuficha maswali matano ndani ya kidokezo kimoja. Inapaswa kuwa mahususi vya kutosha kujibika, lakini si nyembamba kiasi cha kupoteza maana.

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: Jibu la kihistoria la AI lenye manufaa linapaswa kuwa na tabaka mbili.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: Flashcard dhaifu ya AI husema:

entries.source: A weak prompt only names a topic. A strong prompt names the topic, the level, the sticking point, and the kind of help you want. Use this {value1} as the context, then ask the mode to make you do something with it.
entries.value: Kidokezo dhaifu hutaja mada tu. Kidokezo imara hutaja mada, kiwango, sehemu inayokwama, na aina ya msaada unaotaka. Tumia {value1} hii kama muktadha, kisha iombe hali hiyo ikufanye ufanye kitu nayo.

entries.source: A working next move, a clearer bug or concept, and a project path that teaches through doing.
entries.value: Hatua inayofuata inayofanya kazi, hitilafu au dhana iliyo wazi zaidi, na njia ya mradi inayofundisha kupitia kufanya.

entries.source: According to CalOPPA we agree to the following:Users can visit our site anonymously; our Privacy Policy link includes the word “Privacy”, and can easily be found on the home page of our website; Users will be notified of any privacy policy changes on our Privacy Policy Page; Users are able to change their personal information by emailing us at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Kwa mujibu wa CalOPPA tunakubaliana na yafuatayo: Watumiaji wanaweza kutembelea tovuti yetu bila kujitambulisha; kiungo chetu cha Sera ya Faragha kina neno “Privacy” na kinaweza kupatikana kwa urahisi kwenye ukurasa wa nyumbani wa tovuti yetu; Watumiaji watajulishwa kuhusu mabadiliko yoyote ya sera ya faragha kwenye Ukurasa wetu wa Sera ya Faragha; Watumiaji wanaweza kubadilisha taarifa zao binafsi kwa kututumia barua pepe support@inspir.app

entries.value: Aidha, unakubali kutofanya yafuatayo:

entries.source: After each hint, explain why the step works before continuing.
entries.value: Baada ya kila kidokezo, eleza kwa nini hatua hiyo inafanya kazi kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.source: After every learner answer, identify the claim, reasoning, assumptions, gaps, contradictions, or corrected insight. Give one brief read of their answer, update the reasoning map with concise labels, then ask exactly one next-best question.
entries.value: Baada ya kila jibu la mwanafunzi, tambua dai, mantiki, dhana, mapengo, mikanganyiko, au ufahamu uliosahihishwa. Toa usomaji mfupi mmoja wa jibu lao, sasisha ramani ya mantiki kwa lebo fupi, kisha uliza swali moja tu bora linalofuata.

entries.source: After the inspir.app domain was sold to fund continued free access, the live product moved to inspirlearning.com.
entries.value: Baada ya kikoa cha inspir.app kuuzwa ili kufadhili kuendelea kwa ufikiaji wa bure, bidhaa ya moja kwa moja ilihamia inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: After the simulation, summarize the setting, constraints, and evidence.
entries.value: Baada ya uigaji, fupisha mazingira, vikwazo, na ushahidi.

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI inaweza kusaidia kutengeneza flashcards haraka, lakini kujifunza bado hutokana na kukumbuka. Ikiwa zana inaandika kadi na mwanafunzi hajitahidi kamwe kuzijibu, karibu hakuna kilichobadilika. Toleo lenye manufaa hugeuza noti zisizo nadhifu kuwa vidokezo vilivyolengwa, kisha humfanya mwanafunzi akumbuke kabla ya kufichua jibu.

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: AI inaweza kukusaidia kujifunza haraka zaidi. Inaweza pia kukusaidia kukwepa kujifunza kabisa.

entries.source: AI can make one-to-one learning dramatically more available.
entries.value: AI inaweza kufanya kujifunza kwa mtu mmoja mmoja kupatikana zaidi kwa kiwango kikubwa.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI inaweza kugeuza noti mbichi kuwa vidokezo safi vya kukumbuka. Inaweza kugawa mawazo mapana kuwa kadi ndogo, kuongeza mifano, na kutambua mitego ambayo mwanafunzi anaweza kukosa.

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments
entries.value: Kocha wa Mjadala wa AI kwa Hoja Kali Zaidi

entries.source: AI Debate Coach For Sharper Arguments is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Kocha wa Mjadala wa AI kwa Hoja Kali Zaidi ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: chagua mada yoyote na uingie kwenye mjadala halisi ana kwa ana. Chagua upande, changamkiwa, na jifunze kutoa hoja bora.
